meta_title: Wegovy & Mounjaro Prescriptions in Preston | Weight Loss GP
meta_description: Medically supervised weight loss in Preston. Wegovy & Mounjaro prescribed where appropriate. Assessment, support and follow-up with Dr Faizal Secretary. From £119.
hero_h1: Medical Weight Loss in Preston — With Real Support Behind You
hero_sub: Clinically supervised weight loss with Dr Faizal Secretary. Medical assessment, prescription weight loss medication where appropriate, and ongoing support — in Preston, without the wait.
hero_trust: From £119 · Wegovy & Mounjaro Available · Medically Supervised
intro_quote: You've tried everything. The weight isn't shifting. You need clinical support.
intro_heading: Medical Weight Loss in Fulwood, Preston
intro_para_1: Weight loss medication like Wegovy (semaglutide) and Mounjaro (tirzepatide) can be life-changing — but only when prescribed appropriately, after a proper assessment, with clinical oversight.
intro_para_2: At My Private Clinic, every weight loss consultation starts with a full medical assessment. Dr Secretary prescribes only where clinically appropriate, and follows up to monitor progress and safety.

faqs.question: Can I get Wegovy or Mounjaro here?
faqs.answer: Yes, if you are clinically appropriate. A full assessment is required first. Dr Secretary will review your BMI, medical history, and any contraindications before prescribing.

faqs.question: What is the difference between Wegovy and Mounjaro?
faqs.answer: Both are GLP-1 receptor agonists that reduce appetite and support weight loss. Mounjaro (tirzepatide) also targets GIP receptors, making it more effective for some patients. The doctor will advise which is right for you.

faqs.question: How much does the consultation cost?
faqs.answer: The initial weight loss consultation is £119 for 30 minutes. Follow-up appointments are available at £69. The cost of medication is separate and varies by dose.

faqs.question: Is monitoring included?
faqs.answer: Yes. Ongoing monitoring is part of the service. The doctor will schedule follow-up appointments to review progress, side effects and dosage.
